# ADD — Agent Driven Development (Codex runtime v0.9.1)

Auto-generated by `scripts/compile.py` from `core/` + `runtimes/codex/`. Do not edit — change `core/` and recompile.

ADD is a spec-driven, test-first, learning-accumulating, 
maturity-aware methodology for agent-led development. Skills 
dispatch by description match (Codex-native Skills layout); 
the rules below are invariants that apply to every session.

## Invariants (always-loaded rules)

- **add-compliance** — ADD Rule: Compliance — Retro Cadence & SDLC Watchdog
- **agent-coordination** — ADD Rule: Agent Coordination Protocol
- **cache-discipline** — ADD Rule: Cache Discipline
- **environment-awareness** — ADD Rule: Environment Awareness
- **human-collaboration** — ADD Rule: Human-AI Collaboration Protocol
- **injection-defense** — ADD Rule: Prompt-Injection Defense
- **learning** — ADD Rule: Continuous Learning
- **maturity-lifecycle** — ADD Rule: Maturity Lifecycle
- **maturity-loader** — ADD Rule: Maturity-Aware Rule Loading
- **project-structure** — ADD Rule: Project Structure
- **quality-gates** — ADD Rule: Quality Gates
- **registry-sync** — ADD Rule: Project Registry Sync
- **secrets-handling** — ADD Rule: Secrets Handling
- **source-control** — ADD Rule: Source Control Protocol
- **spec-driven** — ADD Rule: Spec-Driven Development
- **tdd-enforcement** — ADD Rule: Test-Driven Development
- **telemetry** — ADD Rule: Structured Telemetry (JSONL)
- **version-migration** — ADD Rule: Version Migration

Full rule bodies live at `.agents/skills/add-<skill>/SKILL.md` where the skill references them, and in `core/rules/` in the source repo.

## Skills

| Command | Skill file | Implicit dispatch | Description |
|---------|------------|-------------------|-------------|
| `/add-agents-md` | `.agents/skills/add-agents-md/SKILL.md` | yes | Generate or sync a portable AGENTS.md from ADD project state — writes, checks drift, or merges with hand-curated content |
| `/add-away` | `.agents/skills/add-away/SKILL.md` | no | Declare absence — get autonomous work plan for the duration |
| `/add-back` | `.agents/skills/add-back/SKILL.md` | yes | Return from absence — get briefing on autonomous work |
| `/add-brand` | `.agents/skills/add-brand/SKILL.md` | yes | View project branding — accent color, palette, drift detection, image gen status |
| `/add-brand-update` | `.agents/skills/add-brand-update/SKILL.md` | no | Update project branding — new colors, fonts, tone, audit artifacts |
| `/add-changelog` | `.agents/skills/add-changelog/SKILL.md` | yes | Generate or refresh CHANGELOG.md from conventional commits |
| `/add-cycle` | `.agents/skills/add-cycle/SKILL.md` | yes | Plan and execute a work cycle — select features, assess parallelism, define validation |
| `/add-dashboard` | `.agents/skills/add-dashboard/SKILL.md` | yes | Generate a visual HTML project dashboard from .add/ project files |
| `/add-deploy` | `.agents/skills/add-deploy/SKILL.md` | no | Environment-aware commit, push, and deploy workflow |
| `/add-docs` | `.agents/skills/add-docs/SKILL.md` | yes | Generate and sync project documentation — architecture diagrams, API docs, README |
| `/add-implementer` | `.agents/skills/add-implementer/SKILL.md` | no | Write minimal implementation to pass tests (TDD GREEN phase) |
| `/add-infographic` | `.agents/skills/add-infographic/SKILL.md` | yes | Generate project infographic — SVG from PRD + config with branding |
| `/add-init` | `.agents/skills/add-init/SKILL.md` | yes | Initialize Agent Driven Development — PRD interview + project setup |
| `/add-learnings` | `.agents/skills/add-learnings/SKILL.md` | yes | Manage learnings — generate active views, archive old entries, show stats |
| `/add-milestone` | `.agents/skills/add-milestone/SKILL.md` | yes | Manage milestones — list, switch, split, rescope, create |
| `/add-optimize` | `.agents/skills/add-optimize/SKILL.md` | yes | Performance optimization pass — identify and fix bottlenecks |
| `/add-plan` | `.agents/skills/add-plan/SKILL.md` | yes | Create implementation plan from a feature spec |
| `/add-promote` | `.agents/skills/add-promote/SKILL.md` | yes | Maturity promotion — gap analysis and level-up workflow |
| `/add-retro` | `.agents/skills/add-retro/SKILL.md` | yes | Run a retrospective — context-aware, data-driven review with pre-populated tables |
| `/add-reviewer` | `.agents/skills/add-reviewer/SKILL.md` | yes | Review code for spec compliance and quality — produces review report |
| `/add-roadmap` | `.agents/skills/add-roadmap/SKILL.md` | yes | View and manage project roadmap — milestones, horizons, reordering |
| `/add-spec` | `.agents/skills/add-spec/SKILL.md` | no | Create a feature specification through structured interview |
| `/add-tdd-cycle` | `.agents/skills/add-tdd-cycle/SKILL.md` | no | Execute complete TDD cycle — RED → GREEN → REFACTOR → VERIFY against a spec |
| `/add-test-writer` | `.agents/skills/add-test-writer/SKILL.md` | yes | Write failing tests from spec (TDD RED phase) |
| `/add-ux` | `.agents/skills/add-ux/SKILL.md` | yes | Iterate on UI/UX design before implementation — wireframes, flow validation, and design sign-off |
| `/add-verify` | `.agents/skills/add-verify/SKILL.md` | yes | Run quality gates — lint, types, tests, coverage, spec compliance |
| `/add-version` | `.agents/skills/add-version/SKILL.md` | yes | Show installed version, project version, and upgrade status |

## Sub-agents

Registered in `.codex/agents/`. Active when `[features] collab = true` (set in emitted `.codex/config.toml`).

- `test-writer` — TDD RED phase (workspace-write, high reasoning)
- `implementer` — TDD GREEN phase (workspace-write, high reasoning)
- `reviewer` — spec-compliance review (read-only, high reasoning)
- `explorer` — broad codebase discovery (read-only, medium reasoning)

## Hooks

Registered in `.codex/hooks.json`. Active when `[features] codex_hooks = true`. See `.codex/hooks/README.md` for the Claude-trigger mapping.

- `SessionStart` → `load-handoff.sh` (surface prior `.add/handoff.md`)
- `Stop` → `write-handoff.sh` (persist session-stop marker)
- `UserPromptSubmit` → `handoff-detect.sh` (detect handoff intent)
